description: Animates rotating a 3D shape around an axis by a specified angle. Supports both g3d mode (creates a new rotated shape with arc animation) and s3d mode (directly mutates the Three.js object rotation).
utility: Rotate 3D shapes around an axis with animation.

arguments.name: axis
arguments.type: vector3d | point3d | three numbers (ax, ay, az)
arguments.description: The rotation axis as a direction vector or three coordinates

alternates.description: Rotate shape around axis defined by a vector
Rotate shape around axis given as point3d coordinates

alternates.syntax: rotate3d(G, shape, angle, ax, ay, az)
alternates.description: Rotate shape around axis defined by three separate values

alternates.syntax: rotate3d(S, shape, angle, ax, ay, az) or rotate3d(S, shape, angle, point3d(S,x,y,z))

examples.scenario: Rotate in s3d mode around y-axis
